# @emisso/sii

> TypeScript SDK for Chile's SII (Servicio de Impuestos Internos) — electronic invoicing, certificate auth, and invoice listing.

- Repo: https://github.com/emisso-ai/emisso-sii
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@emisso/sii
- License: MIT

## Install

npm install @emisso/sii

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/emisso-ai/emisso-sii/blob/main/README.md)
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/emisso-ai/emisso-sii/blob/main/AGENTS.md)

## Key Features

- Authenticate with SII using .p12 digital certificates (SOAP token exchange)
- Build, sign, and submit electronic documents (DTE) — all 10 SII types
- List received and issued invoices via RCV (Registro de Compras y Ventas)
- Download RCV data as CSV
- Folio management (CAF files)
- Self-hosted REST API with certificate vault and multi-tenant support (@emisso/sii-api)

## API

- `loadCertFromFile(path, password)` — Load .p12/.pfx certificate
- `authenticate(cert, options)` — SOAP auth, returns SII token
- `buildDteXml(document)` — Build DTE XML from structured input
- `signDte(xml, cert)` — Sign DTE XML with certificate
- `uploadDte(xml, token, options)` — Submit signed DTE to SII
- `listInvoices(options)` — Fetch RCV invoice listing
- `fetchRcvResumen(options)` — RCV summary by period
- `downloadRcvCsv(options)` — Download RCV as CSV
- `portalLogin(rut, password)` — Web portal session login
